Skip to contents
SelectSim 0.1.6
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Introduction to SelectSim
    • Data Processing with SelectSim
  • Changelog

Get sample/alteration blocks

Source: R/selectX_create.R
get.blocks.Rd

Get sample/alteration blocks

Usage

get.blocks(al)

Arguments

al

The alteration landscape

Value

Classification of samples and alterations in blocks.

Examples

# \donttest{
data(luad_run_data, package = "SelectSim")
al <- new.AL.general(luad_run_data$M,
                     feat.covariates  = luad_run_data$alteration.class,
                     sample.covariates = luad_run_data$sample.class,
                     min.freq = 10)
get.blocks(al)
#> $sample.blocks
#> $sample.blocks$LUAD
#> TCGA-05-4244-01 TCGA-05-4249-01 TCGA-05-4250-01 TCGA-05-4382-01 TCGA-05-4384-01 
#>               1               2               3               4               5 
#> TCGA-05-4389-01 TCGA-05-4390-01 TCGA-05-4395-01 TCGA-05-4396-01 TCGA-05-4397-01 
#>               6               7               8               9              10 
#> TCGA-05-4403-01 TCGA-05-4405-01 TCGA-05-4410-01 TCGA-05-4415-01 TCGA-05-4417-01 
#>              11              12              13              14              15 
#> TCGA-05-4418-01 TCGA-05-4420-01 TCGA-05-4422-01 TCGA-05-4425-01 TCGA-05-4427-01 
#>              16              17              18              19              20
